sentences.arabic: يَأْكُلُ خَالِدٌ الْفَاكِهَةَ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ لِأَنَّهَا مُفِيدَةٌ لِلصِّحَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Halid jede voće svaki dan jer je korisno za zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: Khalid eats fruit every day because it is good for health.
He prefers apples, bananas, and oranges.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتْ لَهُ أُمُّهُ إِنَّ الْفَاكِهَةَ تُقَوِّي الْمَنَاعَةَ.
sentences.translation: Majka mu je rekla da voće jača imunitet.
sentences.translationEn: His mother told him that fruit strengthens immunity.

sentences.arabic: يَأْخُذُ خَالِدٌ قِطْعَةَ فَاكِهَةٍ فِي حَقِيبَتِهِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Halid svaki dan stavlja komad voća u svoju torbu.
sentences.translationEn: Khalid puts a piece of fruit in his bag every day.
